text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out together, I accompany Special
Week back to her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for today. I had lots of fun
hanging out!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But Trainer, I don't wanna go home just yet.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Now that I'm so relaxed, I feel like I can really
focus on my training.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So could I ask you to tag along with me for a little
while longer?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Okay, what should we do now? I'm ready for
whatever, so let me have it!
choice_data_list: Let's work on your finishing dashes.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I see! That's the kind of training to do when I'm
really focused!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All righty! I'm gonna crush this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day out has given Special Week more
motivation than usual to focus on her training,
and she masters her finishing dashes!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I see. This is gonna be more difficult than I
thought, so it's probably best to take it on while
I've got the energy for it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All righty! I'm gonna crush this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day out has given Special Week more
motivation than usual to focus on her training,
and she masters cornering!
